description_long: This is a bright orange classic American muscle car with a two-door coupe body style, featuring a prominent black '01' decal on the doors and a large Confederate flag graphic on the roof. The car has a sleek, elongated hood, a sloping rear, and a blacked-out grille and rear bumper. Chrome trim accents the windows and wheels, while a long radio antenna extends from the rear. The roof also displays the name 'GENERAL LEE' above the side windows. The wheels are dark with a simple multi-spoke design, and the car sits low to the ground, emphasizing its sporty stance. The overall appearance is iconic and instantly recognizable, with bold graphics and a vintage, high-performance aesthetic.
description: A bright orange, two-door classic muscle car with '01' decals, a Confederate flag on the roof, and chrome-trimmed windows and wheels. The car has a sporty, vintage look with a long hood and sloping rear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the '01' decal, chrome trim, and the full length of the car with the Confederate flag and 'GENERAL LEE' text visible on the roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the blacked-out rear bumper, taillights, rear license plate, and the full Confederate flag graphic on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the '01' decal, chrome trim, and the antenna extending from the rear.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the black grille, headlights, long hood, and the front portion of the roof graphic.
attribute_license_plate: Rear license plate present, orange color, text not clearly readable
attribute_wheel_design: Dark multi-spoke wheels with a simple, classic design and metallic trim
